notes: v0.6.1 — Four upgrades to make Gemini behave: (1) View 2 capture switched from Shaded-with-Texture (face_style 4) to plain Shaded (face_style 3) — flat HEX colour zones make the material-table cross-reference unambiguous (each visible solid colour matches a HEX in the table). (2) Hidden Line capture forces clean edges — Profiles / DepthCue / Jitter / Extension / DrawHidden all OFF for the duration of write_image, restored on exit. (3) Texture swatch upload — for each used material that has a texture image (capped 8 per render, max 500 KB each to bound input cost), the texture is dumped to a temp PNG and attached as an additional inlineData; the material table's new 'Texture ref' column tells the model which uploaded image is which material's swatch. (4) Capture resolution dropdown extended with 1536/2048 options for projects that want sharper input detail (cost scales ~linearly with input pixels). All temp files auto-cleaned after each render.
